title: British Chicken Skillet
description: A classic British-inspired dish made with chicken, vegetables, and a savory sauce, all cooked to perfection in a skillet.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the sliced potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the frozen peas and cook until thawed, about 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the flour and milk until smooth.
Pour the milk mixture over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Add the grated cheddar cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
